sections.paragraph:
ἐπιθύω 1 aor. ἐπέθυσα (s. θύω; Aeschyl. et al.; OGI 222, 37; 332, 29; pap [Mayser 33]; LXX; En 19:1) to make an offering (to a deity), offer a sacrifice (w. ὀμνύναι) as a patriotic gesture MPol 4; 8:2; Ac 14:13 v.l.—DELG s.v. 2 θύω.

aor. aor. = aorist

Aeschyl Aeschyl , V b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

OGI OGI = Orientis Graeci Inscriptiones Selectae—List 3

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

Mayser Mayser = EM., Grammatik der griechischen Papyri aus der Ptolemäerzeit—Lists 4, 6

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

En En = I Enoch—List 2

MPol MPol = Martyrdom of Polycarp; after II a.d.—List 1

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 372
